Welcome

Where Comfort Meets Kerala's Timeless Charm

Cobblestone Cottage is a beautifully crafted two-storey villa in the peaceful heart of Kuruppanthara, Kottayam. Named for its signature cobbled driveway, the property blends contemporary comforts with the warm aesthetic of traditional Kerala architecture.

Whether you're here for a family getaway, a quiet working retreat, or a celebration with loved ones — the cottage offers a private, fully equipped haven surrounded by the lush greenery of central Kerala.

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

S
Sijo Thomas
· 2 weeks ago

Our stay at Cobblestone Cottage was excellent, and we truly enjoyed every aspect of it. The property is spacious, well-maintained, and thoughtfully designed with great attention to detail. Both bedrooms are air-conditioned, and all rooms have fans, ensuring comfort throughout. The balcony was one of our favorite spots — it offers seating for four along with two fans, making it a perfect place to relax and unwind. The kitchen is fully functional with all essential cooking utensils. Additional amenities such as filtered drinking water, a washing machine, reliable WiFi, solar power backup, and a dedicated work setup made our stay very convenient. A special mention to the host, Deepu, and his father — they were extremely friendly, helpful, and always responsive, providing timely local information including restaurant options and travel guidance.

Verified Airbnb Review
S
Sujeev
· 1 week ago

Our stay at Cobblestone Cottage was truly wonderful and exceeded all our expectations. The cottage was spotless, beautifully maintained, and had a warm, peaceful atmosphere that instantly made us feel at home. Every room was exceptionally clean, fresh, and hygienic, making our stay very comfortable and relaxing. A special thanks to Deepu, the owner, for his outstanding hospitality. He was incredibly kind, welcoming, and always ready to help whenever needed. From check-in to check-out, everything was smooth and hassle-free. We truly enjoyed our stay and would highly recommend Cobblestone Cottage to anyone looking for a peaceful, clean, and comfortable place with exceptional hospitality.

Verified Airbnb Review
